articles.title: Chipotle takes 'buy the dip' literally with new $200K crypto giveaway
articles.description: The restaurant chain will give away Bitcoin, Ether, Solana, Avalanche, and Dogecoin through its online game.

articles.title: Layer 1 Blockchain Aptos Raises $150M From FTX, Jump Crypto
articles.description: The Series A funding round has brought Aptos Labs total capital raised in 2022 to $350 million. Former Meta employees have raised $150 million in hopes of bringing Diems original objectives to fruition.Aptos Labs announced Monday that it had raised $150 million in a Series A funding round led by FTX Ventures and Jump Crypto, bringing its total funds raised in 2022 to $350 million. A host of...

articles.title: Chipotle Launches ‘Buy the Dip’ Game That Will Give Away $200K in Cryptocurrency
articles.description: On Monday (July 25), Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. (NYSE: CMG) today announced the launch of a new interactive game called “Buy The Dip” that will give away more than $200,000 in $BTC, $ETH, $SOL, $AVAX, and $DOGE. According to Chipotle’s press release, “starting at 10am PT today, fans can access the ‘Buy The Dip’ game by visiting: www.chipotlebuythedip.xyz.” The game will […]

articles.title: Moonbeam now lets you swap tokens between Polkadot and Cosmos
articles.description: Moonbeam has integrated with Axelar and Osmosis to enable the transfer of tokens between the Polkadot and Cosmos ecosystems.

articles.title: Voyager Says FTX’s Buyout Offer Was Misleading “Low-Ball Bid,” SBF Fires Back
articles.description: Commenting on Voyagers response to the proposal, FTX founder and CEO Sam-Bankman Fried said that only the bankruptcy lawyers would benefit from dragging out the proceedings, while the customers would get fucked. Voyager Digital's lawyers and FTX's Sam-Bankman Fried have entered a public spat over Voyager's bankruptcy.In a Sunday court filing, the lawyers representing the bankrupt...

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin: Ethereum Classic Is Fine Chain
articles.description: Creator of Ethereum blockchain says there is nothing wrong with using POW version of Ethereum

articles.title: Bitfinex and Tether launch peer-to-peer video calling app Keet
articles.description: Bitfinex, Tether and Hypercore have built Keet, a peer-to-peer video calling app, on their newly launched Holepunch protocol.

articles.title: Voyager rejects FTX’s ‘low ball’ offer, calls it ‘misleading’
articles.description: Struggling crypto lender Voyager Digital rejected FTX’s offer to buy all its assets and refund customers in a July 24 letter due to it being a “low-ball” offer that may “hurt customers.” FTX’s liquidity offer for Voyager’s customers On July 22, FTX submitted a joint proposal that would have seen it provide liquidity for customers […]

articles.title: Elon Musk On Fire: Tesla CEO Had An Affair With Google Co-Founder’s Wife – Report
articles.description: Elon Musk, a cryptocurrency advocate, played the proverbial fire with the wife of his close friend, Sergey Brin, who co-founded Google in 1998. The hanky-panky caused Brin to file for divorce early this year, putting an end to the tech mogul’s lengthy friendship with Musk, according to Sunday’s article in The Wall Street Journal, which […]

articles.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Correct Gains, Altcoins Show Bearish Signs
articles.description: Bitcoin price started another decline after it failed to settle above the USD 23,000 zone. BTC corrected gains and traded below the USD 22,000 level. It is currently (04:09 UTC) trading near USD 21,900 and is down over 2% in a day and still up 5% in a week. Similarly, most major altcoins have declined. ETH topped near USD 1,665 and declined below USD 1,550. XRP traded below the USD 0.35...
